info.title: Event Management API - Frontend Consumed Endpoints
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for backend endpoints consumed by Homepage, Category pages, Payment page, User Dashboard, and Contact Us page.

tags.name: Homepage
tags.description: Endpoints consumed by Home page and Hero section.

tags.name: Category Pages
tags.description: Endpoints consumed by category listing pages.

tags.name: User Dashboard
tags.description: Endpoints consumed by user dashboard tabs and settings.

tags.name: Contact Us
tags.description: Endpoints consumed by contact information and contact form.

sessionCookie.name: connect.sid
sessionCookie.description: Session cookie set after successful authentication. Required for protected user/payment endpoints.

description.example: Ideas worth spreading on AI and ethics.

get.summary: Fetch events for Home page sections
get.description: Returns events grouped into two streams consumed by Home page: `selling` (`start_selling`) and `upcoming` (`upcoming`) with independent pagination.

200.description: Home page event data retrieved successfully.

get.description: Returns aggregate counts displayed in homepage hero (events and organizers).

message.example: An error occurred while fetching statistics.

get.description: Returns category-matched events with server-side pagination. Category matching is case-insensitive regex. Includes statuses: `start_selling`, `upcoming`, `over`.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category name path segment (frontend sends URL-decoded values like `Health Camp`).

500.description: Server error while fetching category events.

get.summary: Get payment-page event and user data
get.description: Returns event checkout metadata, logged-in user basics, and current tickets left for checkout screen bootstrap.
Polled by payment page to keep ticket availability up-to-date.

post.description: Validates capacity, creates payment record, creates one registration per ticket, and returns transaction details plus updated availability.

400.description: Validation failure (invalid event/tickets or insufficient capacity).

get.description: Returns user profile basics, grouped bookings, and dashboard stats for overview and booking tabs.

404.description: Event not found in saved list.

get.summary: Get activity chart and spending analytics

put.description: Current implementation updates only `name` from submitted payload.

400.description: Missing fields or invalid current password.

post.summary: Cancel booked tickets with time-based refund
post.description: Cancels specified active registrations for one event and computes refund as per policy: >7 days 100%, 3-7 days 50%, <3 days 0%.

ticketCount.description: Optional number of tickets to cancel from registrationIds order.

refundMessage.example: Full refund (more than 7 days before event)

get.description: Returns contact metadata that can be used by Contact Us UI.

post.description: Accepts contact form payload from frontend Contact Us page and attempts to notify support email (simulated when email config is absent).

message.example: I wanted to understand refund eligibility if I cancel two days before the event.
Your message has been received. Our team will contact you shortly.
name, email, subject and message are required
